content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat-to-positive (+0.21%) with Metal/Energy leading and PSU Banks/IT lagging. VIX cooling (-5.3%) signals reduced fear. Book is 60% deployed with modest +0.16% session P&L; priority is managing existing positions (trail SLs on winners, monitor losers near SL) rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -3.3% but Q4 results were strong (PAT +35%, GNPA improved to 1.45%). Current SL 76.50 is below today's low 76.45 and intraday has stabilized near 78.88 above VWAP 78.50. Thesis intact; let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best winner +6.5%. Current SL 1032.38 is already above entry (locked in profit). Tightening slightly to 1025 to give a bit more room around recent intraday low 1042 while still ensuring ~4% gain locked. Target unchanged at 1095. Wait — actually current SL 1032 is tighter than 1025; per rules SL can only be tightened, not loosened. Reverting: HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior entry: SL already at 1032.38 (locked +4.9% gain above entry 984). Today's intraday low 1042 holding above SL. Letting it run toward 1095 target. No tightening needed since current SL is already optimal trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -1.6%. Gold consolidating after March/April correction. SL 119 still ~3.6% away; thesis as portfolio hedge intact given binary macro/tariff risks. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.6%, breaking to fresh 52-wk high after blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +23%). Current SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94 — at breakeven+. No-op MODIFY check: SL=1418 (current), target=1465 (current). Skipping — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2%, Q4 results April 30 (T+2). Binary event ahead with weak Street expectations. SL 2295 about 0.7% below CMP 2312 — tight stop will protect on a disappointing print. Holding into event with discipline; SL handles downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.2% near 52-wk high. Trailing SL from 406 to 408 (still above entry 404.50) to lock in better gain. CMP 411.60, today's low 410.20 holds above new SL. Bullish power sector + EDF nuclear MoU + record peak demand. Target 425 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.7% after gap-up faded (high 1816 to CMP 1770). Stock up ~39% in April — extended. SL 1775 currently breached intraday at 1755.60 low but CMP 1770 below SL; this position may already be triggered. Letting broker SL handle exit if it breaks again. No new action — risk already managed by SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.3% on Organon acquisition catalyst, 5.3x volume. Tightening SL from 1734 (entry/breakeven) to 1740 to lock in small gain. CMP 1761 with intraday low 1714 — wider but the breakout structure is strong. Target 1830 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down -0.6%, marginal. SL 318 just 0.4% below CMP 319.40 — already very tight. Defensive utility, near 52-wk high. Letting the tight SL do its job; no change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print (+12% PAT) and dividend, but stock already up +3.9% intraday near 52-wk high (476). Chasing a one-day spike near top of range with deployment already at 60% is poor R:R. Pass for now; would re-enter on a dip to 455-460."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At all-time high, +3.7% intraday. Deployment hysteresis: book already 60% deployed with pharma exposure via SUNPHARMA. Q4 results in May = binary event. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PIRAMALFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish research — headline PAT driven by one-time gains, P/E 41x, ROE 5.5%. Avoid chasing +8.5% gap-up that lacks fundamental support."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today after market — binary event. NO new entries before binary event days per philosophy."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RRKABEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +5.2% to fresh ATH; Q4 results April 30 = binary event in 2 days. Don't buy ATH into an event with limited margin of safety."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AARTIIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-wk high, +2.86%. Q4 results May 4. Pass — deployment already high and event ahead."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-Q4 beat; SL 76.50 below today's low. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Best winner; SL already trailed to 1032 (above entry, ~+4.9% locked). Target 1095."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Portfolio hedge; near-term gold weak but SL 119 gives room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1418 (above entry), target 1465. Fresh 52-wk high; let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print April 30; tight SL 2295 will manage downside on a miss."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up from 406 to 408 to lock more gain near 52-wk high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1775 currently honoring; no need to tighten further given intraday volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL from 1734 to 1740 on Organon catalyst breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 318 already very tight (0.4% from CMP); no further tightening needed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "COALINDIA, GLENMARK, RRKABEL, AARTIIND all interesting but at/near 52-wk highs into binary events. Will reassess on pullbacks or post-results. PIRAMALFIN avoided due to weak underlying earnings quality. MARUTI Q4 tonight — re-evaluate tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with 9 positions across 5 sectors (Energy, FMCG, Pharma, PSU Bank, Financial Services, Hedge). Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER) is ~12% of capital — at the edge of cluster discipline; will not add more power. Three open BUY orders pending (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) — not stacking duplicates. Multiple positions have SL above entry (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, NTPC after trail, SUNPHARMA after trail) which is excellent risk posture. Priority: let trades work, no new entries today given deployment and binary events on the horizon (HUL Apr 30, RRKABEL Apr 30, AARTIIND May 4, NTPC May 15)."
}
